series_metadata.series_description: Schedule of financial reports: (OBM-GAAP - Generally Accepted Accounting Principles, used to compile the Ohio Comprehensive Annual Financial Report. Statewide Cost Allocation Plan (SWCAP) - ODJFS Allocation of the statewide Cost Allocation Plan Schedule of Federal Financial Assistance - Schedule of federal grants that ODJFS received during the year.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain until no longer administrative value., Electronic: Erase
